config.script:
#include "50203" #include "50202" #include "50101"
function ChoiceList_CreateRow(byref pTableBuilder, byref pHli, byref pObj, byval strName) if (pHli is nothing) then 'Budowanie nagłówka
pTableBuilder.addtext "Nazwa" pTableBuilder.newcell.addtext "Opis"
else
if (not pObj is nothing) then
'Budowanie grupy pTableBuilder.addtexthli strName, pHli pTableBuilder.newcell.addtext pObj.Opis
else
'Budowanie elementu pTableBuilder.addtexthli strName, pHli pTableBuilder.newcell
end if
end if
ChoiceList_CreateRow = true end function
function fopen()
if not HARUI(UAR_CMDID(CMDID_RAPORT_USER)) then fopen = false exit function end if
#ifdef _ABAKUS if HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then fopen = false exit function end if #endif
trans_.var(APPVAR_SEARCH_KIND)="R" 'tworzymy (wybieramy) raport
dim pPageSuggest: set pPageSuggest=doc_.getmodule(43001)
dim pUtilPage:set pUtilPage=doc_.getmodule(60106) dim strWhere:strWhere="cKind='R' and " + pUtilPage.GetWHERE_ForCheckRights(STDR_READ,TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE,"SearchType",trans_.var(GVAR_USER))
pPageSuggest.prepare_choice_list TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE , "Raporty użytkownika " + getCurrentUser().strNazwa ,"Nazwa",strWhere ,"","", GetRef("ChoiceList_CreateRow")
dim choice : choice = pPageSuggest.domodalauto()
if choice <> 0 then
dim pRapHli dim rapObj:set rapObj = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE,choice) if rapObj is nothing then fopen=false exit function end if
trans_.var(APPVAR_SEARCH_KIND)="R" trans_.var(APPVAR_SEARCH_TYPEID) = rapObj.type dim rapIdObj rapIdObj=rapObj.IdObj
set pRapHli=doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_RECORD_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_FORM_SEARCHTYPE")
dim pPM: set pPM=doc_.getpagehli(pRapHli) if pPM is nothing then fopen=false exit function end if pPM.make_report rapIdObj end if fopen=false
end function
